title: Q3 Product Planning Meeting
tldr: Team finalized Vendor A for cloud hosting, scoped Q3 mobile features to push notifications and offline mode, and set API v2 deadline for July 31.
key_takeaways: Vendor A selected for cloud hosting — 20% cost savings and stronger SLA over 3 years.
API v2 migration targeted for July 31 to allow buffer before August 5 campaign launch.
Mobile app Q3 scope limited to push notifications and offline mode due to resource constraints.
Marketing campaign soft launch confirmed for August 5th.

decisions.decision: Proceed with Vendor A for cloud hosting
decisions.rationale: Better pricing (20% savings over 3 years), stronger SLA, and more mature Kubernetes support.

decisions.decision: Limit Q3 mobile features to push notifications and offline mode
decisions.rationale: Resource constraints; remaining features deferred to Q4.

decisions.decision: Set API v2 completion deadline to July 31
decisions.rationale: Provides one-week buffer before August 5 marketing campaign launch.

action_items.task: Draft vendor contract requirements and send to Sarah and legal
Align on Q3 mobile feature scope
action_items.note: James to schedule sync with Anika

action_items.task: Coordinate with marketing team for August 5 soft launch date

suggested_followups: Legal review of Vendor A contract before signing.
Define Q4 mobile feature backlog from remaining user research items.
Post-launch retrospective after August 5 campaign goes live.
